name: Matriarchy Attack
short_description: Pixel woman character game, you are figthing with abnormal enemies. dystopian platform based story game.
detailed_description: Matriarchy Attack is female based character and dystopian storyline platform based game, When you are alone in the road you are encountering a new town. This town surrounded by abnormal people, and you are wondering what is going on in this town. When you are keep furthering, it getting more weird and you encounter more dangerous enemies. These enemies are ruled by patriarchy and you are trying to destroy this patriarchy. Gameplay based on fight and dodge against enemies.
about_the_game: Matriarchy Attack is female based character and dystopian storyline platform based game, When you are alone in the road you are encountering a new town.
